observations.note: All 44 tests pass across 4 test suites. No anti-gaming violations detected. Clean markdown structure.
Service model lacks distinct tagged item (only client engagement mention). Product model tag present only in inventory item title.
Test suites use consistent bash harness pattern with AAA comments. Good reusable pattern for content-validation stories.
No explicit model tagging syntax (e.g., [SaaS], [Product]) on individual items. Adaptation relies on prose description.
BR-003 (resume existing checklist) from story spec is not covered by any test or reference file section. Consider tracking as known gap.
